summary: First iteration E2E test of NK Prestige Steel. Backend: 24/24 pytest tests passed (auth, business-info, prices CRUD + previous_price tracking + CSV export/import, services, testimonials, FAQs, pickup, newsletter, file uploads incl. object storage). Frontend: Home hero, 3D scene, floating contact bar (5 actions), all public pages (Prices/Services/Gallery/Pickup/Contact), auth flow (invalid password toast, valid redirect to /admin), admin route protection, logout, and all 7 admin sidebar tabs verified working.

minor.issue: TestPickup::test_public_create returns a value from the test function (PytestReturnNotNoneWarning). Harmless - fixed by not returning. Not blocking.

issues: WebGL emits high-severity GPU stall warnings on ReadPixels (Chromium in container). Visual output is fine; user impact likely minimal on real GPUs.

action_items: (Optional) Remove `return data['id']` from TestPickup.test_public_create to silence pytest warning.
(Optional) Consider seeding a few gallery items on startup so /gallery is not empty by default (currently relies on admin upload; test env showed pre-uploaded demo items from earlier runs).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 828 lines — consider splitting into routers/models/seed modules for maintainability (>700 lines guideline).

CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers ignore credentialed requests with wildcard origins. If cookies were used it would break; here JWT is via header so it works, but consider explicit origins for production.
put_object/get_object are sync `requests` calls inside async endpoints — will block the event loop. Consider httpx.AsyncClient or run_in_threadpool for uploads.
Login endpoint has no brute-force / rate-limit protection (playbook_testing_instructions mentions 5-fail lockout).
seed_data is idempotent for admin (good) and re-hashes password if changed (good). Prices/services seed only if collection empty — cannot re-seed missing items after partial deletes.
seed_data_creation: None persisted beyond backend built-in seed. All TEST_ prefixed CRUD items were cleaned up in tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runs full API regression against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend testids used: login-{email-input,password-input,submit-btn}, admin-page, admin-tab-{info,prices,services,gallery,testimonials,faqs,pickups}, admin-logout-btn, price-{editor,add-btn,export-btn,import-input,edit-<id>,del-<id>}, floating-contact-bar + float-{call,whatsapp,email,maps,back-top}. Object storage upload/read verified working. Admin/login pages correctly hide the FloatingContactBar; verified count==0 on both.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs identified in this iteration.
